minimum_repeatable_profile.platform: Apple Silicon Mac with Apple Intelligence enabled
minimum_repeatable_profile.toolkit_requirement: Current dev path still requires the local Apple adapter toolkit for the live train/export phase

notes: The repeated Apple Intelligence compatibility popup still appeared during live attempts, but it did not prevent this run from finishing training, export, benchmark, and report generation.
The bottleneck profile is specific to the current toolkit-backed reference lane; it is not evidence about future pure-Rust or clustered Apple training.
Because runtime smoke failed before local summary persistence, the addendum relies on run-log timings and file sizes instead of one already-persisted summary object.
